task: move blue fork to lower right corner
raw:
Scene: blue_fork, purple_cloth, metal_bowl, corn, table
Step 1: reach(blue_fork)
  affordance_region: the blue fork on the purple cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_fork, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_fork) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_fork)
  affordance_region: the blue plastic handle of the fork
  contact: holding(blue_fork) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_fork)
Step 3: transport(blue_fork -> lower_right_corner)
  affordance_region: the lower right corner of the wooden table
  spatial: above(blue_fork, lower_right_corner, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_fork)
  done_when: above(blue_fork, lower_right_corner, 0.05)
Step 4: place(blue_fork -> lower_right_corner)
  affordance_region: the lower right corner of the wooden table
  contact: surface_contact(blue_fork, lower_right_corner) [completion]; released(blue_fork) [completion]
  pose: stable(blue_fork) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(blue_fork, lower_right_corner) AND released(blue_fork) AND stable(blue_fork)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the blue fork on the purple cloth
the blue plastic handle of the fork
